step_plan.current_step: Step 1: PM Planning - Repo-Wide Legacy/Dead-Code Audit (FAST_ANALYSIS)

task_complexity.reason: audit-only 작업으로 repo_wide_legacy_audit.md 단일 파일만 생성. 제품 코드 수정 없음. micro-task 1개. P0/P1 질문 0개. 삭제/이동/외부API/인증/빌드/배포 없음.

design_confirmation.filter_summary: 분류 기준 5가지와 감사 범위는 사용자 원문에 완전히 명시됨. 내부 구현 취향(섹션 순서, 마크다운 스타일 등) 질문은 유지보수성 기준으로 PM이 처리함.

question.user_facing_question: 이번 작업은 repo_wide_legacy_audit.md 보고서 파일 하나만 생성하는 방식으로 진행할까요? (코드 수정 없이 분석 보고서만 만듭니다)
question.evidence: 사용자 원문에 "최종 산출물은 repo_wide_legacy_audit.md 하나만 만든다"고 명시됨.
question.why_it_matters: 단일 보고서로 집중하면 범위 오염 없이 검토가 쉽고, 향후 삭제/수정 작업을 별도 IMP로 진행할 때 이 보고서가 기준이 됩니다.

option.label: MT-1 하나로 진행 - repo_wide_legacy_audit.md만 생성
option.benefit: 범위가 명확하고, git diff 오염이 없으며, 보고서 내용에만 집중할 수 있습니다.
option.cost: 보고서만으로는 실제 삭제가 이뤄지지 않으므로 후속 IMP가 필요합니다.

option.label: 여러 MT로 분해 - 감사 범위별 분리 보고서 생성
option.benefit: pipeline.py / agent MD / workflow 별로 세분화할 수 있습니다.
option.cost: 사용자 요청은 단일 통합 보고서이므로 불필요한 복잡성이 생깁니다.

question.user_answer: 사용자 원문에 "최종 산출물은 repo_wide_legacy_audit.md 하나만 만든다"로 명시됨. 옵션 A로 진행.

step_plan.interface_spec: Input: pipeline.py, .claude/agents/*.md, AGENTS.md, .github/workflows/ci.yml, .github/pull_request_template.md, tests/**, tests/oracles/** Output: repo_wide_legacy_audit.md (project root) Validation: file exists + all 5 classification sections present + no product code modified
step_plan.requirements: 1. Audit scope: pipeline.py, .claude/agents/*.md, AGENTS.md, .github/workflows/ci.yml, .github/pull_request_template.md, tests/**, tests/oracles/**, command examples and completion conditions in docs/agent MDs 2. .pipeline/**, pipeline_outputs/**, dist/build/cache/temp outputs excluded from analysis scope. Only check for PR diff contamination. 3. Current SSoT baseline (post IMP-20260610-8C3B and IMP-20260610-982B): Three-Gate + Option A phase attestation, PM Planner/Manager split, Verification JSON SSoT, Nonce Gate, AC Tracking, module integrate PASS + ac_completeness cache, request-accept acceptance snapshot atomic creation, Technical / Oracle / GitHub CI / Human ACCEPT hard gates 4. Legacy patterns to identify: classic harness completion (pipeline.py harness --score ...), numeric final score completion (BUILD+QA sum), manual packet SHA sync, test_results.jsonl-based COMPLETE declaration, single PM agent flow, Phase 6-7 intermediate user confirmation question pattern 5. Five classification criteria: DELETE_CANDIDATE_HIGH, DELETE_CANDIDATE_LOW, MODIFY_CANDIDATE, PRESERVE, NEEDS_INVESTIGATION 6. Absolute prohibitions: no pipeline.py modification, no .claude/agents/*.md modification, no tests/** deletion, no tests/oracles/** modification, no cleanup_report.md modification, no git diff outside repo_wide_legacy_audit.md 7. Required report sections: audit purpose, audit date and current SSoT baseline, audit scope, classification criteria description, 5 classification item lists with file/location/rationale, audit summary and follow-up recommendations 8. FAST_ANALYSIS constraints: no product code (.py/.js/.ts/.ps1 etc.) modification, only 1 micro-task allowed

criterion.text: repo_wide_legacy_audit.md is created at project root and contains all 5 sections: DELETE_CANDIDATE_HIGH, DELETE_CANDIDATE_LOW, MODIFY_CANDIDATE, PRESERVE, NEEDS_INVESTIGATION

git diff --name-only HEAD does not include pipeline.py, .claude/agents/*.md, .github/workflows/ci.yml or other product code/agent MD/workflow files (only repo_wide_legacy_audit.md and IMP-20260611-6574 oracle files are changed)
DELETE_CANDIDATE_HIGH section contains at least 1 item. At minimum one of: classic harness completion path, numeric final score completion, or pipeline.py harness --score pattern must be identified.
Each item in the report includes: filename, location (line number or section name), and rationale for legacy classification relative to current SSoT baseline.

decomposition_audit.split_decision: audit-only work. Output is single repo_wide_legacy_audit.md file. Meets FAST_ANALYSIS profile conditions (1 micro-task, no product code modification). Single MT-1 without splitting.

micro_task.change_summary: Analyze entire repo and generate repo_wide_legacy_audit.md report classifying legacy/dead-code candidates under 5 categories based on current SSoT baseline. No actual files modified.

step_plan.forbidden: No pipeline.py modification | No .claude/agents/*.md modification | No .github/workflows/ci.yml modification | No tests/** deletion | No tests/oracles/** modification of existing files | No CLAUDE.md modification | No cleanup_report.md modification | No git diff outside repo_wide_legacy_audit.md | No new product code file creation | FAST_ANALYSIS violation: no implementation beyond single MT-1

target_files.file: C:\Users\hojiy\OneDrive\Desktop\Projects\Really good agents for QA and Orchestra\pipeline.py

C:\Users\hojiy\OneDrive\Desktop\Projects\Really good agents for QA and Orchestra\.claude\agents\qa-agent.md
C:\Users\hojiy\OneDrive\Desktop\Projects\Really good agents for QA and Orchestra\AGENTS.md

context_injection.phase_rules_excerpt: FAST_ANALYSIS: no product code modification, 1 micro-task. Output is repo_wide_legacy_audit.md only. If git diff contains .py/.md(agent MD)/.yml modifications, stop immediately and revert. dev-agent must perform scope_lock_check before outputting handover.
context_injection.prev_phase_summary: PM planning complete. Contract frozen (hash: 8216dac6). MT-1: create repo_wide_legacy_audit.md. Oracles: tests/oracles/IMP-20260611-6574/ (normal + edge, 2 cases). Current SSoT: Three-Gate + PM Planner/Manager split + Verification JSON SSoT + Nonce Gate + AC Tracking.

build_decision.note: FAST_ANALYSIS profile. repo_wide_legacy_audit.md is an MD file and not subject to EXE build. Pipeline Manager records: build --exe N/A --skip-reason meta-task.
